dialogues.dialogue: And neither do I understand this. I'd heard that the moon( Chand) is only ecliPsed. But I didn't know the moon seeks shameless Pleasures. Tell me, which desire of yours is it. . . . .that I've left unfulfilled?

You shouldn't have infringed uPon anyone's honour. This girl had shot my horse! For only that? You should be ashamed. Do you not know, that honour is more Precious than a horse? Here, take my head-dress. . .( mark of honour)

though we grow uP together. . .you, my daughter have said it in Public? I have loved you so! And you've turned out to be so shameless! How is she to fault? You haven't even taught her these etiquette!
Forgive me. Please forgive me. I swear by the Pyres of my dead. . .that I shall destroy the Pride of the man who has devastated my family. I beg of you, God
